creator: junovitch@freebsd.org
text:
The URL referenced in comment 0 is unreachable and the referenced version is not reachable when attempting to update.

=> robodoc-4.99.43.tar.gz doesn't seem to exist in /usr/ports/distfiles/.
=> Attempting to fetch http://rfsber.home.xs4all.nl/Robo/robodoc-4.99.43.tar.gz
fetch: http://rfsber.home.xs4all.nl/Robo/robodoc-4.99.43.tar.gz: Not Found
=> Attempting to fetch http://seis.bris.ac.uk/~mexas/distfiles/robodoc-4.99.43.tar.gz
fetch: http://seis.bris.ac.uk/~mexas/distfiles/robodoc-4.99.43.tar.gz: Not Found
=> Attempting to fetch http://distcache.FreeBSD.org/ports-distfiles/robodoc-4.99.43.tar.gz

Set open and set needs-patch/needs-qa.  There doesn't seem to be anything to do until there is a fetchable upstream.
